summary: Implemented US-008: Collect resource timing metrics. Added ResourceTimingEntry domain type, normalizeLoadDuration and computeMeanDuration helpers, and ResourceTimingCollector class that uses PerformanceObserver to collect resource entries with a configurable rolling window (default 50). Feature detection via isResourceTimingSupported() ensures graceful degradation in unsupported browsers. Fixed lint issues in pre-generated test files. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 163 unit tests, 23 e2e tests.
